reviews.review_msg: This Guy is terrible.  All he talks about is his BS company.  He has yet to actually teach us anything, and relies on the class to teach for him. He doesn't even pay attention during presentations. Dont take this class.. He will ruin your dreams!

He isn't very enthusiastic about teaching, and it appears that he does the minimum amount required to get by. He doesn't provide feedback at all, and is impossible to get a hold of, to the point where he is ignoring emails.  Extremely "hands off" teaching style to say the least. I wouldn't recommend classes with him; he grades hard w/o explanation

He is probably the worst professor in the Faculty of Business at SFU. He spent classes ranting about his own life and was not contactable so your mark basically came out of nowhere and you couldn't question it. Hope SFU gets rid of him soon.

Good intentioned teacher, but lazy and provides little feedback. Interesting at times (and pretty easy class), but you don't really learn anything. Very little support for your project. Nice prof, but wouldn't recommend the course.
